findings.location: sections.s1 — HTMLフォーム例の説明
findings.description: The parenthetical note "（input要素のname属性は `フォーム名.プロパティ名` 形式）" is not stated in the source. Additionally, the description is incomplete: the HTML form also contains `name="userForm.user.id"` which is a three-level pattern (`フォーム名.エンティティ名.プロパティ名`), not just two-level.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows both `name="userForm.phoneNo1"` (two levels) and `name="userForm.user.id"` (three levels) without any explicit statement about the naming format rule.
